calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status In Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary Mayo for and with Joseph Whitcomb (Executor).

Ms. Mayo stated that she and her Client made numerous attempts to work with the Brother to sell the property together and that they were unsuccessful. Ms. Mayo also stated that her Client did not want to do a partition action, that he chose to sell his 50% interest at a reduced price (sold on August 11th), that the Brother sold his share on October 6th, that the Estate share is $240,000.00, that the Brother's share is $300,000.00, that the Brother received notice, and that there is no appearance or objection. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
